description_long: This bungalow features a sprawling single-story layout with a dark, multi-faceted hip roof and a combination of brick and siding exterior walls. The front entrance is accentuated by a small porch area, flanked by manicured shrubs and a driveway with parked vehicles. Large windows wrap around the structure, providing ample natural light and a modern, open feel. The side and rear elevations reveal a mix of grouped and individual windows, as well as a subtle transition between brick and siding materials. The property is landscaped with several trees and bushes, enhancing its suburban residential character. A detailed floor plan is visible, indicating a spacious interior with multiple rooms and open living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark hip roof, brick and siding exterior, large wraparound windows, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, driveway with cars, and prominent landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long brick wall, grouped windows, and a clear look at the floor plan layout.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the wraparound windows, roof complexity, and backyard landscaping.
description_view_3: Back and side view emphasizing the transition between brick and siding, rear windows, and driveway access.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and wraparound windows
